sub_modules.butterfly_unit: Combinational radix-2 DIT butterfly unit that applies Q1.15 rounded complex multiply (twiddle rotation) to the q operand and computes p+t, p-t sums/differences.
sub_modules.twiddle_rom: Combinational lookup table returning cos_q15/sin_q15 twiddle coefficients for index 0..8 per the specified Q1.15 table.
sub_modules.bitrev_addr: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal address generator used to permute input samples into bit-reversed order before butterfly stages.
sub_modules.stage_index_gen: Combinational logic computing butterfly operand indices (idx_p, idx_q) and twiddle ROM index for a given FFT stage and butterfly number within that stage.
